global-Erasmus+ Staff Mobility Worldwide

Between 2022-2024 academic years, the administrative and academic staff of the following universities can participate to the program with Erasmus+ funds. The funds will be paid by Kadir Has University.

Binus University (BINUS), Indonesia

Van Lang University (VLU), Vietnam

ADA University (ADA), Azerbaijan

Ivane Javakhishvili Tbilisi State University, (TSU) Georgia

Technical University of Moldova (TUM), Moldova

National University of Kyiv-Mohyla Academy (NaUKMA), Ukraine

Almaty Management University (AlmaU), Kazakhstan

The Southern Federal University (SFedU), Russia

Quilmes National University (QNU), Argentina

Finis Terrae University (FTU), Chile

Rabat Business School (RBS), Morocco

Modern University for Business and Science (MUBS), Lebanon

Université Hassiba Benbouali de Chlef (UHBC), Algeria

Princess Sumaya University for Technology (PSUT), Jordan

You can contact your home university to find out the application criteria and calendar for more information. Once your home university nominates you, we will contact you for further details.
